action.reasoning: Observation: RTX 5090 (sm_120) needs CUDA 12.8+, current PyTorch has cu118. Analysis: Need to install PyTorch with cu128 or use CPU. Decision: Try installing PyTorch nightly with cu128. If fails, use CPU with DLinear which is fast enough.
action.command: pip install --pre torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly/cu128 2>&1 | tail -5 && python -c "import torch; print('PyTorch:', torch.__version__); x = torch.randn(2,2).cuda(); print('GPU works!', x)"
